subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Faḍl! The All-Bountiful bestoweth His favor through this most blessed and exalted Word that hath shone forth from the horizon of the heaven of the Supreme Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضل فضال میفرماید باینکلمه مبارکه علیا که از افق سماء قلم اعلی اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @consultation
